info.title: wiro/ugc creator API (Signature Auth)
info.description:
API for running tasks and retrieving task details and status.

## Authentication
HMAC-SHA256 signature authentication using three headers:
- `x-api-key`: Your API key from Wiro dashboard
- `x-nonce`: Unix timestamp or any random integer
- `x-signature`: HMAC-SHA256 hash of (API_SECRET + NONCE) using API_KEY

### Signature Generation (Bash)
```bash
export YOUR_API_KEY="your-api-key"
export YOUR_API_SECRET="your-api-secret"
export NONCE=$(date +%s)
export SIGNATURE=$(echo -n "${YOUR_API_SECRET}${NONCE}" | openssl dgst -sha256 -hmac "${YOUR_API_KEY}")

curl -X POST "https://api.wiro.ai/v1/Task/Detail" \
  -H "x-api-key: ${YOUR_API_KEY}" \
  -H "x-nonce: ${NONCE}" \
  -H "x-signature: ${SIGNATURE}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"taskid": "420206"}'
```

post.description: Retrieve the current status and output of a task using taskid, tasktoken, or uuid.

byTaskIdWithUuid.summary: Get task by ID with UUID

parameters.system_instructions: You are a helpful voice assistant.

post.description: Cancel a task that is still in the queue (not yet started).

post.summary: Run UGC Creator for Product Ads
post.description:
Generates custom video content from product images and text for marketing campaigns.

**Processing Time:** 150 seconds

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid signature or API key

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Your API key from Wiro dashboard

NonceAuth.name: x-nonce
NonceAuth.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) or any random integer. Example: 1738800000

result.description: Indicates if the request was successful

errors.description: List of error messages (empty on success)

taskid.description: Unique task identifier for polling status

socketaccesstoken.description: Token for WebSocket connection or alternative task lookup

TaskKillRequest.description: Provide either taskid or socketaccesstoken to identify the task

taskid.description: Task ID to cancel (must be in queue)
Task ID returned from Run endpoint

uuid.description: User UUID (optional). Use 'me' for current user or specific UUID for admin access

TaskDetailRequest.description: Provide either taskid or tasktoken to identify the task

errors.description: List of error messages (empty on success)

result.description: Indicates if the request was successful

socketaccesstoken.description: Socket access token for WebSocket connections

parameters.description: Input parameters used for this task

createtime.description: Unix timestamp when task was created

canceltime.description: Unix timestamp when task was cancelled

assigntime.description: Unix timestamp when task was assigned to worker

accepttime.description: Unix timestamp when task was accepted

guestid.description: Guest ID if task was run by guest user

projectid.description: Project ID associated with the task

modelid.description: Model ID used for the task

callbackurl.description: Callback URL for task completion webhook

isapp.description: Whether task is from an app

slugapp.description: App slug if isapp is true

outputs.description: Output files generated by the task

url.description: CDN URL to download the output file

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Required. Std mode is 5 seconds, pro mode is 10 seconds

script.title: Script
script.description: Required. Enter your video script. Note: Scripts exceeding the time limit for the selected mode will be cut short. Choose a longer duration mode for extensive scripts.

callbackUrl.title: Callback URL
callbackUrl.description: Optional webhook URL. Wiro will send a POST request to this URL when the task is completed.

x-task-status-info.description: Task status values and their meanings

completed_statuses.description: Terminal states - stop polling when received

values.description: Task completed successfully and post-processing is done
Task was cancelled by the user or system
